title: IMMZD18SHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SHPVSingleDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First HPV dose from the primary series w.en: First HPV dose from the primary series was administered
First HPV dose from the primary series was administered and client's HIV status is positive or client is immunocompromised

Second HPV dose from the primary series.en: Second HPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second HPV dose from the primary series was administered and client's HIV status is positive or client is immunocompromised

Third HPV dose from the primary series w.en: Third HPV dose from the primary series was administered
